title: Region
description: Closed enum of spatial scopes. Tier taxonomy: RegionalCouncil ∪ TerritorialAuthority ∪ National. TerritorialAuthority values are deferred until ≥3 RegionalCouncil-tier regions are populated (CLAUDE.md §5, decision 2). PI to verify canonical slugs against the LINZ geographical-names registry before the Wellington proof run.

RegionalCouncil.description: 16 NZ regional councils (including four unitary authorities: Gisborne, Tasman, Nelson, Marlborough). Slug spellings are PI-tunable.

TerritorialAuthority.description: 67 NZ territorial authorities. Deferred until ≥3 RegionalCouncil-tier regions are populated. PI extends this list when activating TA-granularity data.
